ab: Sndamac namu balay, saya u madas yamu musa alang smiling pprngaw rdrudan ka mptusa.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老們。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m taking you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: Malu wah! Pprngaw ta rdrudan pa asi ka pprngaw ta nanaq kari ta Sediq.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老們說我們自己賽德克族語。

ab: Uxay ta biyaw dhuq da hu?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: Uxay ta biyaw dhuq da.
en: B: We’re almost there.

ab: tama rudan, wisu nami miyah qmita sunan da.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: Mkla namu rmngaw kari Sediq hay! Laway bay knmalu kiya da!
ch: B:你們會說賽德克語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You speak sydykes! That’s great!

ab: Sndamac namu balay, mpwela yamu musa qnpahan tmukuy macu ka mptusa saya.
ch: A:大家好，老師今天要帶大家去小米田工作。
en: A:Hello everyone, today I will take you to work in the millet field.

ab: Iyaq, mptusa.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: Awah tbku mhiyu hini kana, iya chngi madas ka qqiya ddiyun qmpah.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: Iyaq, mptusa, wa nami madas qqiya ddiyun qmpah kana da.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: Wisu ta dhuq da hu?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: Ini dhuq na, thiyaq balay na.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: Usa cmuwiq qsiya ka isu.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: Iyaq, yaku ka muda cmuwiq qsiya.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: Usa mangal plwaqan qduda ka isu.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: Iyaq, yaku ka musa lmiwaq qduda.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: Sndamac namu balay, musa ta sanan mita ccamac ka saya.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: Taway bay knmalu wah! Mphuya ta musa hu?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: Tapa ta rulu basu musa.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: Blayaq tbku mhiyu kana, psramal ta mari kipu.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: Iyaq.
en: B: Yes.

ab: Brah u qduda, bukuy u quyu, hayi nanaq sdmhaw qmita.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: Mptusa, micu ku quyu wah.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: Ini huya, so kiya u usa qmita qduda ka isu.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: Kingal jikang spngan da u awah ta msturung hini dungan.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來這裡集合。
en: A: We’ll meet back here in an hour.

ab: Iyaq, mhuway su balay mptusa.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: Manu ka qntan su diyax saya?
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: Wada ku qmita ou bay quyu, kari bay ka qduda uri.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: Nhari hari, mmosa ta da.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: Tawa ku han, mowic bay ka qaqay mu.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: Psupu ta musa tmapaq qsiya haw?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: Iyaq wah! Nta pa!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: Hbaraw bay sediq ka wisu tmapaq qsiya hini.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: Rbuq bay ka qsiya hiya, tmapaq ta qsiya hini da malu da.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
